title: Hyper_Sea_5000
description:
WARNING: This game contains flashing lights and an intense learning curve.

-You have been trapped in a warp cube. Every faction of the Cube Federation is out to get you. You are on your own, but you were trapped for a reason. Make them pay.

 

-Use your main weapons, a charge shot, incredible speed, mid-air dodging, power crystals dropped occasionally by defeated cubes and crystal fishes, and even the warp cube itself to fight the Cube Federation. 

-Fight various "cubes", big cubes, weird cubes, and boss "cubes" to draw out the most powerful ship in the Federation. 

 

-After beating the biggest boss of them all, the real game can begin, test your skill in the endless mode and fight tooth and nail to achieve the highest scores possible.
description_short: Neo-Retro Arcade Shooter. Trapped in a warp cube, for your crimes against the Cube Federation, you must fly and shoot around, use charge shots, mid-air dodges, and power crystals in the most advance ship in the galaxy and fight a relentless onslaught of various "cubes."
